zh.lifeSummary: Lord Llywarch Goch ab Iorwerth是Iorwerth ap Cynan和N.N. ferch Ithel的兒子，於1150年出生在英國威爾斯丹比爾。他和Lady Tangwystl ferch Llywarch至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1230年在英國威爾斯享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lord Llywarch Goch ab Iorwerth是Iorwerth ap Cynan和N.N. ferch Ithel的儿子，于1150年出生在英国威尔斯丹比爾。他和Lady Tangwystl ferch Llywarch至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1230年在英国威尔斯享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Llywarch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional, now only occasionally used: compound of the god's name Lugu- ( see Lleu ) + Old Celtic marcos ‘horse’.

nameMeanings.name: Goch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: ab
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: Lord Llywarch Goch ab Iorwerth was born in 1150, in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom as the son of Iorwerth ap Cynan and N.N. ferch Ithel. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Lady Tangwystl ferch Llywarch. He died in 1230, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lord Llywarch Goch ab Iorwerth est né en 1150, à Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, fils de Iorwerth ap Cynan et N.N. ferch Ithel. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Lady Tangwystl ferch Llywarch. Il est décédé en 1230, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Lord Llywarch Goch ab Iorwerth wurde 1150 in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Iorwerth ap Cynan und N.N. ferch Ithel geboren. Er hatte mit Lady Tangwystl ferch Llywarch mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1230 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Lord Llywarch Goch ab Iorwerth è nato il nel 1150 nel Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito come figlio di Iorwerth ap Cynan e N.N. ferch Ithel. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Lady Tangwystl ferch Llywarch. Morì nel 1230, nel Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Llywarch Goch ab Iorwerthは1150年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアでIorwerth ap CynanとN.N. ferch Ithelの息子として生まれた。彼はLady Tangwystl ferch Llywarchとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1230年にイギリスウェールズで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Llywarch Goch ab Iorwerth(은)는 1150년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르에서 Iorwerth ap Cynan(와)과 N.N. ferch Ithel의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Lady Tangwystl ferch Llywarch(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1230년 영국 웨일스에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Lord Llywarch Goch ab Iorwerth родился в 1150 г. в местности денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Iorwerth ap Cynan и N.N. ferch Ithel. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Lady Tangwystl ferch Llywarch. Он умер в 1230 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет.
